degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial config review requested explicit zero/false constructor overrides and custom HTTP client ownership handling.
Initial client-safety review requested custom HTTP client ownership handling and explicit ValidateCredentials behavior.
Updated config with pointer override fields for zero/false values, tracked exporter-owned clients, and made ValidateCredentials fail closed without network until live validation is implemented.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
